defaultValue: [TIP:] Once in-game check your [Intel Screen] (Missions tab) for the [Faction Manager] - it lets you browse ALL loaded factions and toggle blacklist status with a single click!
Or enter faction IDs manually below separated by commas. The Sirix presets auto-populate this with AI/special factions. Choose [Custom] preset to define your own list.
[Vanilla:] remnant | omega | derelict | pirates | hegemony | tritachyon | persean | sindrian_diktat | luddic_church | luddic_path | independent
[Mods:] hmi_nightmare | mess | jdp_deadcomm | threat | rat_abyssals | sotf_dreaminggestalt | zea_elysians | zea_dusk | zea_dawn | khewarpedomega | ml_bounty | nex_derelict

fieldDescription: Factions listed here will NOT have their ships replaced. Use lowercase IDs separated by commas.
